1.englishFortune: You've been ignoring signs that you need rest. Slow down before you burn out.
1.chinesePoem:
身心疲憊已多時
莫再硬撐傷元氣
及時歇息養精神
方能長久走下去

2.englishFortune: You'll laugh at something unexpected today. Stay open to it.
2.chinesePoem:
今日忽逢趣事來
莫將心事鎖眉間
一笑之間解千愁
且將歡喜掛心懷

3.englishFortune: Be mindful of your diet these days. A little more balance goes a long way.
3.chinesePoem:
近日飲食宜留意
均衡有度益身心
莫因貪嘴傷脾胃
細水長流保安寧

4.englishFortune: Family harmony is strong right now. This is a good time to bring everyone together.
4.chinesePoem:
家庭和睦正當時
宜聚親人敘舊情
團圓時刻多珍惜
福氣滿堂樂融融

5.englishFortune: Something you're holding onto is holding you back. It may be time to let go.
5.chinesePoem:
心中執念放不下
反被此念所拖累
不如放手向前看
輕裝上陣路更寬

6.englishFortune: Someone close to you is thinking of you right now. Reach out first.
6.chinesePoem:
心上之人正念你
莫再等待先開口
一句問候暖人心
情緣自此更深厚

7.englishFortune: Someone may have feelings for you, but the timing isn't right yet. Be patient.
7.chinesePoem:
有人心意藏未顯
時機未到且莫急
耐心等待緣分至
水到渠成自分明

8.englishFortune: Trust your gut on this one, even if it's inconvenient right now.
8.chinesePoem:
心中直覺莫忽視
縱然不便亦當從
莫因方便違本心
順從直覺路自通

9.englishFortune: The opportunity you want is closer than it looks. Keep putting in the effort.
9.chinesePoem:
所求機會近在前
莫因未見而灰心
持續努力終可得
水到渠成自天成

10.englishFortune: A relationship needs an honest conversation, not more guessing.
10.chinesePoem:
情中疑惑莫再猜
坦誠相待解心懷
莫將心事藏心底
直言方能見真心

11.englishFortune: Your hard work is about to be noticed by the right person. Stay the course.
11.chinesePoem:
辛勞終將被看見
貴人自有賞識時
莫因未見先氣餒
堅持到底必有為

12.englishFortune: Good humor follows you today. People will enjoy your company.
12.chinesePoem:
今日幽默伴身旁
談笑風生人歡喜
處處逢人皆結緣

13.englishFortune: Someone from your past may come back into your thoughts. Consider carefully before acting.
13.chinesePoem:
舊人舊事上心頭
莫因一時亂了求
三思而後再決定
免得重蹈覆轍愁

14.englishFortune: Your instincts are sharp right now. Trust them and act accordingly.
14.chinesePoem:
此時直覺甚敏銳
大膽依從莫遲疑
所感所想皆有理
順勢而為必得宜

15.englishFortune: Double-check important documents or plans this week before finalizing.
15.chinesePoem:
近日文件宜細查
莫因疏忽留隱患

免得事後費周折

16.englishFortune: A trip planned now will go more smoothly than you expect.

此時出行正順利

莫因擔憂多顧慮

17.englishFortune: Your feelings are ahead of the situation right now. Give it more time before deciding.

18.englishFortune: An old friend may reach out. Take the time to answer, even if you're busy.

19.englishFortune: A relationship in your life is at a turning point. Which way it goes depends on you.
19.chinesePoem:

21.englishFortune: A work decision is coming. Take time to think it through before answering.

22.englishFortune: A bold career move made now will pay off within the year.

此時勇敢邁一步

莫因猶豫錯良機

23.englishFortune: You may be reading too much into small signals. Ask instead of assuming.
23.chinesePoem:
小小訊號莫多想

24.englishFortune: A small change in habit today will matter more than you expect down the road.
24.chinesePoem:
今日小小改變起

25.englishFortune: Something you thought was lost will turn up in an unexpected place.
25.chinesePoem:

27.englishFortune: A funny mix-up will happen today, but it works out fine in the end.
27.chinesePoem:

29.englishFortune: This connection is still forming. Don't rush to define it just yet.

31.englishFortune: Something will go better than expected today, in a way that makes you smile.

97.chinesePoem:
耐心修煉終有報
所待之事將成真
莫因等待生疑慮
福報自來慰苦心

98.englishFortune: Plans may shift last minute today. Roll with it, the new version works out fine.
98.chinesePoem:
今日計畫或有變
莫因此事心生煩
隨機應變自有法
變中另有一番天

99.englishFortune: Good news may come from somewhere far away. Stay open to it.
99.chinesePoem:
遠方佳音將傳來
意外之喜莫錯過
敞開心懷迎消息
福自遠方降臨時

100.englishFortune: Your feelings are ahead of the situation right now. Give it more time before deciding.
100.chinesePoem:
情深已在事之先
莫急下定論斷言
且待時機成熟後
自然明朗見真言
